segments.text: This internship portal could land you an internship at Google and Salesforce. If you're in college, the real problem isn't lack of opportunities, it's a lack
of visibility. The government [music] of India's national internship portal is a single system that tracks internships across government and private companies.
[music] Not just ministries, companies like Google, Salesforce along with central and state government [music]
roles all in one place. It features remote internships, statewide opportunities, contains multiple domains, one [music] dashboard. Most
students don't struggle because they're unskilled. They struggle because they discover the [music] right platforms too late. If something like this existed
earlier, many early career mistakes [music] wouldn't even happen. So, don't treat this as just another government portal. The link [music] is in the pinned comment below.
